allow: PowerShell($path = "d:\\Projectos\\css\\tv time\\Cineca.html"; $lines = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllLines\($path, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\); $tpl = $lines[209] | ConvertFrom-Json; $tpl = $tpl.Replace\("COLA_AQUI_A_ANON_KEY", "sb_publishable__p4MMY5hZGbQnmSc6Ul_9Q_Qs2z1BCV"\); $lines[209] = $tpl | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllLines\($path, $lines, [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new\($false\)\); $back = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllLines\($path, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\)[209] | ConvertFrom-Json; if \($back.Contains\("sb_publishable__p4MMY5hZGbQnmSc6Ul_9Q_Qs2z1BCV"\) -and $back.Contains\("dwwzuvuadkcvimszzahf"\)\) { "Chave e URL inseridos OK" } else { "ERRO" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://dwwzuvuadkcvimszzahf.supabase.co/rest/v1/titles?select=id&limit=1" -Headers @{ "apikey" = "sb_publishable__p4MMY5hZGbQnmSc6Ul_9Q_Qs2z1BCV"; "Authorization" = "Bearer sb_publishable__p4MMY5hZGbQnmSc6Ul_9Q_Qs2z1BCV" } -UseBasicParsing; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\) — tabela existe. Resposta: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { $resp = $_.Exception.Response; if \($resp\) { $sr = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($resp.GetResponseStream\(\)\); "Erro $\([int]$resp.StatusCode\): $\($sr.ReadToEnd\(\)\)" } else { "Erro: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($body = '{"name":"TESTE \(pode apagar\)","year":2026,"kind":"Série","genre":"Drama","seasons":2,"episodes_per_season":[10,8],"total_episodes":18,"poster":null}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Method POST -Uri "https://dwwzuvuadkcvimszzahf.supabase.co/rest/v1/titles" -Headers @{ "apikey" = "sb_publishable__p4MMY5hZGbQnmSc6Ul_9Q_Qs2z1BCV"; "Authorization" = "Bearer sb_publishable__p4MMY5hZGbQnmSc6Ul_9Q_Qs2z1BCV"; "Prefer" = "return=representation" } -ContentType "application/json; charset=utf-8" -Body \([System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($body\)\) -UseBasicParsing; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Content } catch { $resp = $_.Exception.Response; if \($resp\) { $sr = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($resp.GetResponseStream\(\)\); "Erro $\([int]$resp.StatusCode\): $\($sr.ReadToEnd\(\)\)" } else { "Erro: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($sp = "C:\\Users\\cesar\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\d--Projectos-css-tv-time\\e8364168-7536-4029-92e4-bc9809f3703c\\scratchpad"; $path = "d:\\Projectos\\css\\tv time\\Cineca.html"; $lines = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllLines\($path, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\); $tpl = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\("$sp\\template.html", [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\); $json = $tpl | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; $lines[209] = $json; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllLines\($path, $lines, [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new\($false\)\); $back = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllLines\($path, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\)[209] | ConvertFrom-Json; if \($back -eq $tpl\) { "OK - reempacotado e round-trip idêntico" } else { "AVISO - diferença" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://dwwzuvuadkcvimszzahf.supabase.co/rest/v1/titles?select=id,in_list&limit=1" -Headers @{ "apikey" = "sb_publishable__p4MMY5hZGbQnmSc6Ul_9Q_Qs2z1BCV"; "Authorization" = "Bearer sb_publishable__p4MMY5hZGbQnmSc6Ul_9Q_Qs2z1BCV" } -UseBasicParsing; "Coluna in_list existe: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { $resp = $_.Exception.Response; if \($resp\) { $sr = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($resp.GetResponseStream\(\)\); "Coluna nao existe ainda — erro $\([int]$resp.StatusCode\): $\($sr.ReadToEnd\(\)\)" } else { "Erro: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })
